title: Skip Server Resource Packs
description: This mod allows you to join servers that require resource-packs without having to download/use those resource-packs
body:
This mod allows you to circumvent resource-pack requirements on servers. Allowing you to play on servers which require a resource-pack without having to download said resource-pack.
   
![A screenshot of the prompt screen that a player would be presented with this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc961fdd36bcc04496c858770f797b8176e0994b.png)

Please note that this mod only starts taking effect after the server prompts you to download/accept the resource pack, If you have already enabled the server resource pack, you will have to change the `Server Resource Packs` option in the `Server Info` tab to `Prompt` or `Disabled`.

If you want to enable the resource-pack for a server afterwards, simply change `Server Resource Packs` option in the `Server Info` tab to "Enabled"

**This mod is completely client sided**
